prompt:
Pass both the control and data context into handle

Specifically: add parameter controlCtx context.Context to handleProxy

specs.signature: func(ctx context.Context, _ github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/daemon/worker/proxy.DecryptFn, conn net.Conn, out *github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/daemon/worker/proxy.ProxyDialer, connId string, _ *google.golang.org/protobuf/types/known/anypb.Any, _ github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/daemon/worker/proxy.RecordingManager) (github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/daemon/worker/proxy.ProxyConnFn, error)
